text: Both spaces are strikingly modern, yet they evoke contrasting moods within me. The glass meeting room feels cold, a bit sterile, yet brimming with latent possibility—it is a threshold for collaboration and, perhaps, revelation through dialogue. The R+D display wall, on the other hand, bursts with creative energy. The bold colors and visionary language remind me of the urgency for innovation. I feel like an explorer at the frontier of thought and technology; my curiosity is piqued and I am compelled to consider not just what humanity can create, but why we are driven to do so.
